function initials(name) {
  return name
    .split(" ")
    .slice(0, 2)
    .map((w) => w[0])
    .join("")
    .toUpperCase();
}

export default function App() {
  const [language, setLanguage] = useState("en");
  const [page, setPage] = useState("browse");
  const [selectedJob, setSelectedJob] = useState(null);
  const [savedJobs, setSavedJobs] = useState([]);
  const [search, setSearch] = useState("");
  const [filterType, setFilterType] = useState("");
  const [filterExp, setFilterExp] = useState("");
  const [filterGender, setFilterGender] = useState("");
  const [filterScheme, setFilterScheme] = useState("");
  const [reportedJobs, setReportedJobs] = useState([]);
  const [voiceLoading, setVoiceLoading] = useState(false);
  const [liteMode, setLiteMode] = useState(false);
  const [toast, setToast] = useState("");
  const [postedJobs, setPostedJobs] = useState([]);
  const [postForm, setPostForm] = useState({ title: "", company: "", location: "", salary: "", type: "Full-time", domain: "Farming", desc: "" });
  const [aiSkills, setAiSkills] = useState("");
  const [aiResult, setAiResult] = useState("");
  const [aiLoading, setAiLoading] = useState(false);
  const [employees, setEmployees] = useState([
    { id: 1, name: "Ramesh Kumar", role: "Driver", wageType: "daily", wageAmount: 500, attendance: {}, experience: 18, rating: 4.3 },
    { id: 2, name: "Sunita Bai", role: "Silai Mistri", wageType: "monthly", wageAmount: 9000, attendance: {}, experience: 24, rating: 4.8 },
  ]);
  const [selectedEmployee, setSelectedEmployee] = useState(null);
  const [empForm, setEmpForm] = useState({ name: "", role: "", wageType: "daily", wageAmount: "" });
  const [applications, setApplications] = useState([]);
  const [applyingJob, setApplyingJob] = useState(null);
  const [applyForm, setApplyForm] = useState({ name: "", phone: "", message: "" });
  const [expandedJobId, setExpandedJobId] = useState(null);
  const [online, setOnline] = useState(typeof navigator !== "undefined" ? navigator.onLine : true);
  const [showMap, setShowMap] = useState(false);

  const t = lang[language];
  const allJobs = [...postedJobs, ...initialJobs];

  useEffect(() => {
    try {
      const saved = localStorage.getItem("jobhub-savedJobs");
      const posted = localStorage.getItem("jobhub-postedJobs");
      const apps = localStorage.getItem("jobhub-applications");
      const employeesData = localStorage.getItem("jobhub-employees");
      const lite = localStorage.getItem("jobhub-liteMode");
      if (saved) setSavedJobs(JSON.parse(saved));
      if (posted) setPostedJobs(JSON.parse(posted));
      if (apps) setApplications(JSON.parse(apps));
      if (employeesData) setEmployees(JSON.parse(employeesData));
      if (lite === "true") setLiteMode(true);
    } catch (error) {
      console.warn(error);
    }
    const onlineHandler = () => setOnline(true);
    const offlineHandler = () => setOnline(false);
    window.addEventListener("online", onlineHandler);
    window.addEventListener("offline", offlineHandler);
    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener("online", onlineHandler);
      window.removeEventListener("offline", offlineHandler);
    };
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    try {
      localStorage.setItem("jobhub-savedJobs", JSON.stringify(savedJobs));
      localStorage.setItem("jobhub-postedJobs", JSON.stringify(postedJobs));
      localStorage.setItem("jobhub-applications", JSON.stringify(applications));
      localStorage.setItem("jobhub-employees", JSON.stringify(employees));
      localStorage.setItem("jobhub-liteMode", liteMode ? "true" : "false");
    } catch (error) {
      console.warn(error);
    }
  }, [savedJobs, postedJobs, applications, employees, liteMode]);

  const filtered = allJobs.filter((job) => {
    const query = search.toLowerCase();
    const matchQuery =
      !query ||
      job.title.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||
      job.company.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||
      job.location.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||
      job.desc.toLowerCase().includes(query);
    const matchType = !filterType || job.type === filterType;
    const matchExp = !filterExp || job.exp === filterExp;
    const matchGender = !filterGender || job.gender === filterGender;
    const matchScheme = !filterScheme || job.scheme === filterScheme;
    return matchQuery && matchType && matchExp && matchGender && matchScheme;
  });

  const displayedJobs = liteMode ? filtered.slice(0, 12) : filtered;

    setToast(msg);
    setTimeout(() => setToast(""), 2500);

      id: Date.now(),

      verified: false,
      hires: 0,
      gender: "all",
      scheme: "",
      applyNumber: "08001234999",
      smsKeyword: "NEWJOB",

    setPostForm({ title: "", company: "", location: "", salary: "", type: "Full-time", domain: "Farming", desc: "" });

    setApplyingJob(job);
    setApplyForm({ name: "", phone: "", message: "" });

  function submitApplication() {
    if (!applyForm.name.trim() || !applyForm.phone.trim()) {
      showToast(t.fillAll);
      return;
    }
    const newApp = {
      id: Date.now(),
      jobId: applyingJob.id,
      jobTitle: applyingJob.title,
      name: applyForm.name.trim(),
      phone: applyForm.phone.trim(),
      message: applyForm.message.trim(),

      appliedAt: new Date().toLocaleDateString(language === "hi" ? "hi-IN" : "en-IN", { day: "numeric", month: "short" }),

    setApplications([newApp, ...applications]);
    setApplyingJob(null);
    showToast(t.appSubmitted);
  }

  async function runAIMatch() {
    if (!aiSkills.trim()) { showToast(t.fillAll); return; }
    setAiLoading(true);
    setAiResult("");
    try {
      const jobList = allJobs.map((j) => `${j.id}. ${j.title} at ${j.company}, ${j.location} — ${j.salary}`).join("\n");
      const res = await fetch("https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          model: "claude-sonnet-4-6",
          max_tokens: 800,
          system: `You are a helpful career advisor for rural India, especially Neemuch-Mandsaur area of MP. Respond in ${language === "hi" ? "Hindi" : "English"}. Given a candidate's skills and job listings, recommend top 3 matches with simple, encouraging reasons. Format: '1. Job at Company — reason'. Add one short tip. Keep language very simple for village/small town people.`,
          messages: [{ role: "user", content: `My skills: ${aiSkills}\n\nAvailable jobs:\n${jobList}\n\nTop 3 matches?` }],
        }),
      });
      const data = await res.json();
      const text = data.content?.map((c) => c.text || "").join("") || (language === "hi" ? "कनेक्ट नहीं कर सका।" : "Could not get recommendations.");
      setAiResult(text);
    } catch {
      setAiResult(language === "hi" ? "कनेक्ट नहीं कर सका। कृपया फिर कोशिश करें।" : "Could not connect. Please try again.");
    }
    setAiLoading(false);
  }

    setReportedJobs([...reportedJobs, jobId]);

  function readJobAloud(job) {
    if (!window.speechSynthesis) {
      showToast(t.readUnavailable);
      return;
    }
    const voiceText = `${job.title}. ${job.company}. ${job.location}. ${job.desc}`;
    const utterance = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(voiceText);
    utterance.lang = language === "hi" ? "hi-IN" : "en-US";
    window.speechSynthesis.speak(utterance);
  }

  function startVoiceSearch() {
    const SpeechRecognition = window.SpeechRecognition || window.webkitSpeechRecognition;
    if (!SpeechRecognition) {
      showToast(t.voiceUnavailable);
      return;
    }
    setVoiceLoading(true);
    try {
      const recognition = new SpeechRecognition();
      recognition.lang = language === "hi" ? "hi-IN" : "en-US";
      recognition.interimResults = false;
      recognition.maxAlternatives = 1;
      recognition.onresult = (event) => {
        const transcript = event.results[0][0].transcript;
        setSearch(transcript);
        setVoiceLoading(false);
        showToast(language === "hi" ? `आपने कहा: ${transcript}` : `Heard: ${transcript}`);
      };
      recognition.onerror = () => {
        setVoiceLoading(false);
        showToast(language === "hi" ? "वॉइस सर्च रुक गई" : "Voice search stopped");
      };
      recognition.onend = () => setVoiceLoading(false);
      recognition.start();
    } catch {
      setVoiceLoading(false);
      showToast(language === "hi" ? "वॉइस सर्च शुरू नहीं हो सकी" : "Could not start voice search");
    }
  }

  function cycleAttendance(empId, key) {
    setEmployees((prev) =>
      prev.map((e) => {
        if (e.id !== empId) return e;
        const current = e.attendance[key];
        const next = { ...e.attendance };
        if (!current) next[key] = "present";
        else if (current === "present") next[key] = "leave";
        else delete next[key];
        return { ...e, attendance: next };
      })
    );
    setSelectedEmployee((prev) => {
      if (!prev || prev.id !== empId) return prev;
      const current = prev.attendance[key];
      const next = { ...prev.attendance };
      if (!current) next[key] = "present";
      else if (current === "present") next[key] = "leave";
      else delete next[key];
      return { ...prev, attendance: next };
    });
  }

  function monthStats(emp, year, month) {
    const prefix = `${year}-${month}-`;
    let present = 0;
    let leave = 0;
    Object.keys(emp.attendance).forEach((k) => {
      if (k.startsWith(prefix)) {
        if (emp.attendance[k] === "present") present++;
        else if (emp.attendance[k] === "leave") leave++;
      }
    });
    const salary = emp.wageType === "daily" ? present * emp.wageAmount : Math.max(0, Math.round(emp.wageAmount - leave * (emp.wageAmount / 30)));
    return { present, leave, salary };
  }

            </select>
            <select style={s.select} value={filterExp} onChange={(e) => setFilterExp(e.target.value)}>
              <option value="">{t.allLevels}</option>
              <option value="Entry">{t.entry}</option>
              <option value="Mid">{t.mid}</option>
              <option value="Senior">{t.senior}</option>
            </select>
            <button style={s.chip(filterGender === "women-only")} onClick={() => setFilterGender(filterGender === "women-only" ? "" : "women-only")}>{t.womenOnly}</button>
            <button style={s.chip(filterGender === "family-friendly")} onClick={() => setFilterGender(filterGender === "family-friendly" ? "" : "family-friendly")}>{t.familyFriendly}</button>
            <button style={s.chip(filterScheme === "Government" ? true : false)} onClick={() => setFilterScheme(filterScheme === "Government" ? "" : "Government")}>{t.governmentScheme}</button>
            <button style={s.chip(liteMode)} onClick={() => setLiteMode(!liteMode)}>{t.liteMode}</button>
          </div>

          <div style={s.layout}>
            <div style={s.jobList}>
              {displayedJobs.length === 0 ? (
                <p style={{ color: "#999", textAlign: "center", marginTop: "2rem", fontSize: 15 }}>{t.noJobs}</p>
              ) : displayedJobs.map((job, index) => {
                const c = colors[index % colors.length];
                const selected = selectedJob?.id === job.id;
                const isSaved = !!savedJobs.find((j) => j.id === job.id);
                const isReported = reportedJobs.includes(job.id);
                return (
                  <div key={job.id} style={s.jobCard(selected)} onClick={() => setSelectedJob(job)}>
                    <div style={s.cardTop}>
                      <div style={s.logoBox(c.bg, c.text)}>{initials(job.company)}</div>
                      <div style={{ flex: 1 }}>
                        <div style={s.jobTitle}>{job.title}</div>
                        <div style={s.jobSub}>{job.company} · {job.location}</div>
                      </div>
                      <button onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); toggleSave(job); }} style={{ background: "none", border: "none", cursor: "pointer", fontSize: 22, color: isSaved ? "#FAC775" : "#ddd" }}>★</button>
                    </div>
                    <div style={s.badgeRow}>
                      {job.verified && <span style={s.badge("#E6F1FB", "#185FA5")}>{t.verifiedEmployer}</span>}
                      {job.scheme && <span style={s.badge("#EAF3DE", "#3B6D11")}>{job.scheme}</span>}
                      <span style={s.badge("#FAEEDA", "#854F0B")}>{job.type}</span>
                      <span style={s.badge("#FAECE7", "#993C1D")}>{job.salary}</span>
                      <span style={s.badge("#FBEAF0", "#993556")}>{job.hires || 0} {t.hiresCount}</span>
                    </div>
                    <div style={{ display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", alignItems: "center", marginTop: 12, flexWrap: "wrap", gap: 8 }}>
                      <button style={{ ...s.actionBtn, ...s.secondaryBtn, borderRadius: 14, minWidth: 110 }} onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); reportJob(job.id); }}>{isReported ? (language === "hi" ? "रिपोर्ट की गई" : "Reported") : t.reportThis}</button>
                      <button style={{ ...s.actionBtn, ...s.secondaryBtn, borderRadius: 14, minWidth: 110 }} onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); shareWhatsApp(job); }}>{t.shareWhatsApp}</button>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                );
              })}
            </div>

            <div style={s.detail}>
              {!selectedJob ? (
                <div style={s.empty}>
                  <span style={{ fontSize: 54 }}>💼</span>
                  <p>{t.selectJob}</p>
                </div>
              ) : (
                <>
                  <div style={{ display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", alignItems: "flex-start", gap: 12, flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
                    <div>
                      <div style={s.detailTitle}>{selectedJob.title}</div>
                      <div style={s.detailSub}>{selectedJob.company} · {selectedJob.location} · {t.posted} {selectedJob.posted}</div>
                      <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 8, flexWrap: "wrap", marginTop: 10 }}>
                        {selectedJob.verified && <span style={s.smallTag}>✅ {t.verifiedEmployer}</span>}
                        {selectedJob.gender && selectedJob.gender !== "all" && <span style={s.smallTag}>{selectedJob.gender === "women-only" ? t.womenOnly : t.familyFriendly}</span>}
                        {selectedJob.scheme && <span style={s.smallTag}>{selectedJob.scheme}</span>}
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    <div style={s.detailActions}>
                      <button style={{ ...s.actionBtn, ...s.primaryBtn }} onClick={() => openApply(selectedJob)}>{t.applyNow}</button>
                      <button style={{ ...s.actionBtn, ...s.secondaryBtn }} onClick={() => callToApply(selectedJob)}>{t.missedCallApply}</button>
                      <button style={{ ...s.actionBtn, ...s.secondaryBtn }} onClick={() => applyBySms(selectedJob)}>{t.applyBySMS}</button>
                      <button style={{ ...s.actionBtn, ...s.secondaryBtn }} onClick={() => readJobAloud(selectedJob)}>{t.readAloud}</button>
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  <div style={s.metaRow}>
                    <span style={s.metaItem}>📍 {selectedJob.location}</span>
                    <span style={s.metaItem}>⏰ {selectedJob.type}</span>
                    <span style={s.metaItem}>💰 {selectedJob.salary}</span>
                    <span style={s.metaItem}>📈 {selectedJob.exp}</span>
                    <span style={s.metaItem}>👥 {selectedJob.hires || 0} {t.hiresCount}</span>
                  </div>

                  <div style={s.section}>
                    <div style={s.sectionTitle}>{t.aboutRole}</div>
                    <p style={{ fontSize: 15, color: "#444", lineHeight: 1.8 }}>{selectedJob.desc}</p>
                  </div>

                  <div style={s.section}>
                    <div style={s.sectionTitle}>{t.requirements}</div>
                    <ul style={{ paddingLeft: "1.2rem", color: "#444" }}>
                      {selectedJob.req.map((req, index) => (
                        <li key={index} style={{ marginBottom: 6, fontSize: 14 }}>{req}</li>
                      ))}
                    </ul>
                  </div>

                  <div style={s.section}>
                    <div style={s.sectionTitle}>{t.skills}</div>
                    <div>{selectedJob.skills.map((skill) => <span key={skill} style={s.skillTag}>{skill}</span>)}</div>
                  </div>

                  <div style={s.mapCard}>
                    <div style={{ display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", alignItems: "center", marginBottom: 10, flexWrap: "wrap", gap: 10 }}>
                      <strong>{t.nearbyJobs}</strong>
                      <button style={{ ...s.actionBtn, ...s.secondaryBtn, borderRadius: 14 }} onClick={() => setShowMap(!showMap)}>{showMap ? (language === "hi" ? "छिपाएँ" : "Hide") : (language === "hi" ? "दिखाएँ" : "Show")}</button>
                    </div>
                    {showMap ? (
                      <div style={{ minHeight: 140, borderRadius: 18, background: "linear-gradient(135deg, #E9F4FF 0%, #fff 100%)", padding: 14, color: "#154A86" }}>
                        <p style={{ margin: 0, fontSize: 14 }}>📍 {selectedJob.location} and nearby villages. Recommended for daily-wage and distance-sensitive work.</p>
                      </div>
                    ) : (
                      <p style={{ margin: 0, fontSize: 14, color: "#5E7D9A" }}>{language === "hi" ? "नज़दीकी नौकरियों के लिए दिखाएँ दबाएँ।" : "Tap Show to see nearby job clusters and local demand."}</p>
                    )}
                  </div>
                </>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        </>
      )}

      {page === "ai" && (
        <div style={s.page}>
          <h2 style={{ fontSize: 24, fontWeight: 700, marginBottom: 10 }}>{t.aiMatchTitle}</h2>
          <p style={{ color: "#555", fontSize: 15, marginBottom: "1rem" }}>{t.aiMatchSub}</p>
          <div style={s.aiBox}>
            <textarea style={{ width: "100%", border: "none", outline: "none", fontSize: 15, lineHeight: 1.7, resize: "vertical", minHeight: 110, background: "transparent", fontFamily: "inherit", color: "#111" }} placeholder={t.aiPlaceholder} value={aiSkills} onChange={(e) => setAiSkills(e.target.value)} />
          </div>
          <button style={s.aiBtn} onClick={runAIMatch} disabled={aiLoading}>{aiLoading ? t.matching : t.matchBtn}</button>
          {aiResult && (
            <div style={s.aiResult}>
              <h3 style={{ fontSize: 16, fontWeight: 700, marginBottom: 10 }}>✨ {t.topMatches}</h3>
              <p style={{ fontSize: 14, color: "#444", lineHeight: 1.8, whiteSpace: "pre-wrap" }}>{aiResult}</p>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      )}

      {page === "saved" && (
        <div style={s.page}>
          <h2 style={{ fontSize: 24, fontWeight: 700, marginBottom: 14 }}>{t.savedJobs}</h2>
          {savedJobs.length === 0 ? (
            <div style={s.empty}><span style={{ fontSize: 52 }}>🔖</span><p>{t.noSaved}</p></div>
          ) : savedJobs.map((job, index) => {
            const c = colors[index % colors.length];
            return (
              <div key={job.id} style={s.jobCard(false)} onClick={() => { setSelectedJob(job); setPage("browse"); }}>
                <div style={s.cardTop}>
                  <div style={s.logoBox(c.bg, c.text)}>{initials(job.company)}</div>
                  <div style={{ flex: 1 }}>
                    <div style={s.jobTitle}>{job.title}</div>
                    <div style={s.jobSub}>{job.company} · {job.location}</div>
                  </div>
                  <span style={s.badge("#FAEEDA", "#854F0B")}>{job.salary}</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            );
          })}
        </div>
      )}

      {page === "employer" && (() => {
        const now = new Date();
        const year = now.getFullYear();
        const month = now.getMonth();
        const daysInMonth = new Date(year, month + 1, 0).getDate();
        const monthName = now.toLocaleDateString(language === "hi" ? "hi-IN" : "en-IN", { month: "long", year: "numeric" });
        return (
          <div style={{ ...s.page, display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "1fr 1.5fr", gap: 18 }}>
            <div>
              <div style={s.empAddBox}>
                <label style={s.formLabel}>{t.employeeName}</label>
                <input style={{ ...s.formInput, marginBottom: 10 }} placeholder="e.g. Ramesh Kumar" value={empForm.name} onChange={(e) => setEmpForm({ ...empForm, name: e.target.value })} />
                <label style={s.formLabel}>{t.employeeRole}</label>
                <input style={{ ...s.formInput, marginBottom: 10 }} placeholder="e.g. Driver, Mistri" value={empForm.role} onChange={(e) => setEmpForm({ ...empForm, role: e.target.value })} />
                <label style={s.formLabel}>{t.wageType}</label>
                <select style={{ ...s.formInput, marginBottom: 10 }} value={empForm.wageType} onChange={(e) => setEmpForm({ ...empForm, wageType: e.target.value })}>
                  <option value="daily">{t.dailyWageOpt}</option>
                  <option value="monthly">{t.monthlyWageOpt}</option>
                </select>
                <label style={s.formLabel}>{t.wageAmount}</label>
                <input type="number" style={{ ...s.formInput, marginBottom: 10 }} placeholder="e.g. 500" value={empForm.wageAmount} onChange={(e) => setEmpForm({ ...empForm, wageAmount: e.target.value })} />
                <button style={s.submitBtn} onClick={handleAddEmployee}>{t.addBtn}</button>
              </div>
              {employees.length === 0 ? (
                <p style={{ color: "#999", marginTop: 18 }}>{t.noEmployees}</p>
              ) : employees.map((emp, idx) => {
                const stats = monthStats(emp, year, month);
                return (
                  <div key={emp.id} style={s.empCard(selectedEmployee?.id === emp.id)} onClick={() => setSelectedEmployee(emp)}>
                    <div style={s.cardTop}>
                      <div style={s.empAvatar(colors[idx % colors.length].bg, colors[idx % colors.length].text)}>{initials(emp.name)}</div>
                      <div style={{ flex: 1 }}>
                        <div style={s.jobTitle}>{emp.name}</div>
                        <div style={s.jobSub}>{emp.role}</div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    <div style={s.badgeRow}>
                      <span style={s.badge("#D9F0E0", "#1B7A43")}>{stats.present} {t.daysPresent}</span>
                      <span style={s.badge("#FBE6D4", "#A35A0B")}>{stats.leave} {t.daysLeave}</span>
                      <span style={s.badge("#EAF3DE", "#3B6D11")}>₹{stats.salary}</span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                );
              })}
            </div>
            <div style={{ background: "#fff", borderRadius: 20, padding: "1.5rem" }}>
              {!selectedEmployee ? (
                <div style={s.empty}>
                  <span style={{ fontSize: 46 }}>🧑‍🔧</span>
                  <p>{t.selectEmployeeMsg}</p>
                </div>
              ) : (() => {
                const emp = employees.find((e) => e.id === selectedEmployee.id) || selectedEmployee;
                const stats = monthStats(emp, year, month);
                return (
                  <>
                    <div style={{ display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", alignItems: "flex-start", gap: 10, flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
                      <div>
                        <div style={s.detailTitle}>{emp.name}</div>
                        <div style={s.detailSub}>{emp.role} · {emp.wageType === "daily" ? `₹${emp.wageAmount}${t.perDay}` : `₹${emp.wageAmount}${t.perMonth}`}</div>
                      </div>
                      <button style={s.removeLink} onClick={() => removeEmployee(emp.id)}>{t.removeWorker}</button>
                    </div>
                    <div style={s.statRow}>
                      <div style={s.statBox("#E6F1FB", "#185FA5")}>
                        <div style={s.statNum}>{stats.present}</div>
                        <div style={s.statLabel}>{t.daysPresent}</div>
                      </div>
                      <div style={s.statBox("#FBE6D4", "#A35A0B")}>
                        <div style={s.statNum}>{stats.leave}</div>
                        <div style={s.statLabel}>{t.daysLeave}</div>
                      </div>
                      <div style={s.statBox("#EAF3DE", "#3B6D11")}>
                        <div style={s.statNum}>₹{stats.salary}</div>
                        <div style={s.statLabel}>{t.estSalary}</div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    <div style={s.section}>
                      <div style={s.sectionTitle}>{t.experienceCard}</div>
                      <p style={{ fontSize: 14, color: "#555", lineHeight: 1.7 }}>📅 {emp.experience} {language === "hi" ? "दिन काम" : "days worked"} · ⭐ {emp.rating || 0} {t.rating}</p>
                    </div>
                    <div style={s.section}>
                      <div style={s.sectionTitle}>{t.thisMonth} — {monthName}</div>
                      <p style={{ fontSize: 13, color: "#777", marginTop: 6, marginBottom: 10 }}>{t.tapToMark}</p>
                      <div style={s.calGrid}>
                        {Array.from({ length: daysInMonth }, (_, idx) => {
                          const day = idx + 1;
                          const key = dateKey(year, month, day);
                          const status = emp.attendance[key];
                          return (
                            <div key={day} style={s.calCell(status)} onClick={() => cycleAttendance(emp.id, key)}>{day}</div>
                          );
                        })}
                      </div>
                      <div style={s.legendRow}>
                        <span><span style={s.legendDot("#1B7A43")}></span>{t.legendPresent}</span>
                        <span><span style={s.legendDot("#A35A0B")}></span>{t.legendLeave}</span>
                        <span><span style={s.legendDot("#ccc")}></span>{t.legendUnmarked}</span>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </>
                );
              })()}
            </div>
          </div>
        );
      })()}

      {page === "post" && (
        <div style={s.page}>
          <h2 style={{ fontSize: 24, fontWeight: 700, marginBottom: 16 }}>{t.postTitle}</h2>
          <div style={s.formGrid}>
            <div>
              <label style={s.formLabel}>{t.jobTitle}</label>
              <input style={s.formInput} placeholder="e.g. Driver, Mistri, Teacher" value={postForm.title} onChange={(e) => setPostForm({ ...postForm, title: e.target.value })} />
            </div>
            <div>
              <label style={s.formLabel}>{t.companyName}</label>
              <input style={s.formInput} placeholder="e.g. Ramesh Ji ka Kaam" value={postForm.company} onChange={(e) => setPostForm({ ...postForm, company: e.target.value })} />
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style={s.formGrid}>
            <div>
              <label style={s.formLabel}>{t.jobLocation}</label>
              <input style={s.formInput} placeholder="e.g. Neemuch, Mandsaur" value={postForm.location} onChange={(e) => setPostForm({ ...postForm, location: e.target.value })} />
            </div>
            <div>
              <label style={s.formLabel}>{t.jobSalary}</label>
              <input style={s.formInput} placeholder="e.g. ₹500/day or ₹10,000/month" value={postForm.salary} onChange={(e) => setPostForm({ ...postForm, salary: e.target.value })} />
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style={s.formGrid}>
            <div>
              <label style={s.formLabel}>{t.jobType}</label>
              <select style={s.formInput} value={postForm.type} onChange={(e) => setPostForm({ ...postForm, type: e.target.value })}>
                <option value="Full-time">{t.fullTime}</option>
                <option value="Part-time">{t.partTime}</option>
                <option value="Daily Wage">{t.dailyWage}</option>
                <option value="Internship">{t.internship}</option>
              </select>
            </div>
            <div>
              <label style={s.formLabel}>{t.jobDomain}</label>
              <select style={s.formInput} value={postForm.domain} onChange={(e) => setPostForm({ ...postForm, domain: e.target.value })}>
                <option>Farming</option>
                <option>Construction</option>
                <option>Teaching</option>
                <option>Healthcare</option>
                <option>Transport</option>
                <option>Skilled Work</option>
                <option>Government</option>
                <option>Technical</option>
                <option>Engineering</option>
                <option>Other</option>
              </select>
            </div>
          </div>
          <label style={s.formLabel}>{t.jobDesc}</label>
          <textarea style={{ ...s.formInput, minHeight: 120, resize: "vertical" }} placeholder="Kaam ke baare mein batayen / काम के बारे में बताएं..." value={postForm.desc} onChange={(e) => setPostForm({ ...postForm, desc: e.target.value })} />
          <button style={s.submitBtn} onClick={handlePost}>{t.publish}</button>

          <div style={{ marginTop: 40, paddingTop: 18, borderTop: "1px solid #eee" }}>
            <h2 style={{ fontSize: 20, fontWeight: 700, marginBottom: 16 }}>{t.yourPostedJobs}</h2>
            {postedJobs.length === 0 ? (
              <p style={{ color: "#999", fontSize: 14 }}>{t.noPostedJobsYet}</p>
            ) : postedJobs.map((job, idx) => {
              const apps = applications.filter((a) => a.jobId === job.id);
              const expanded = expandedJobId === job.id;
              return (
                <div key={job.id} style={s.postedJobCard}>
                  <div style={{ display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", alignItems: "center", gap: 12, flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
                    <div>
                      <div style={s.jobTitle}>{job.title}</div>
                      <div style={s.jobSub}>{job.company} · {job.location}</div>
                    </div>
                    <button style={s.chip(expanded)} onClick={() => setExpandedJobId(expanded ? null : job.id)}>{apps.length} {t.applicantsLabel} {expanded ? "▲" : "▼"}</button>
                  </div>
                  {expanded && (
                    <div style={{ marginTop: 14, borderTop: "1px solid #f1f1f1", paddingTop: 14 }}>
                      {apps.length === 0 ? (
                        <p style={{ fontSize: 14, color: "#999" }}>{t.noApplicants}</p>
                      ) : apps.map((app) => (
                        <div key={app.id} style={s.applicantCard}>
                          <div style={{ display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", gap: 10, flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
                            <strong style={{ fontSize: 15 }}>{app.name}</strong>
                            <span style={{ fontSize: 13, color: "#666" }}>{t.appliedOn} {app.appliedAt}</span>
                          </div>
                          {app.message && <p style={{ fontSize: 14, color: "#444", margin: "8px 0" }}>{app.message}</p>}
                          <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 10, flexWrap: "wrap", alignItems: "center" }}>
                            <a href={`tel:${app.phone}`} style={{ fontSize: 14, color: "#185FA5", textDecoration: "none", fontWeight: 700 }}>📞 {app.phone}</a>
                            <button style={s.hireBtn(app.status === "hired")} onClick={() => toggleHired(app.id)}>{app.status === "hired" ? t.hired : t.markHired}</button>
                            <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 6 }}>
                              {Array.from({ length: 5 }, (_, index) => (
                                <div key={index} style={s.ratingDot(app.rating > index)} onClick={() => rateApplication(app.id, index + 1)}></div>
                              ))}
                              <span style={{ fontSize: 13, color: "#555" }}>{app.rating ? `${app.rating}/5` : (language === "hi" ? "रेट करें" : "Rate")}</span>
                            </div>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  )}
                </div>
              );
            })}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {applyingJob && (
        <div style={s.modalOverlay} onClick={() => setApplyingJob(null)}>
          <div style={s.modalBox} onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}>
            <h3 style={{ fontSize: 20, fontWeight: 700, marginBottom: 8 }}>{t.applyFormTitle}</h3>
            <p style={{ fontSize: 14, color: "#555", marginBottom: 16 }}>{applyingJob.title} · {applyingJob.company}</p>
            <label style={s.formLabel}>{t.yourName}</label>
            <input style={s.formInput} placeholder="e.g. Suresh Patel" value={applyForm.name} onChange={(e) => setApplyForm({ ...applyForm, name: e.target.value })} />
            <label style={s.formLabel}>{t.yourPhone}</label>
            <input style={s.formInput} type="tel" placeholder="e.g. 98765 43210" value={applyForm.phone} onChange={(e) => setApplyForm({ ...applyForm, phone: e.target.value })} />
            <label style={s.formLabel}>{t.yourMessage}</label>
            <textarea style={{ ...s.formInput, minHeight: 90, resize: "vertical" }} value={applyForm.message} onChange={(e) => setApplyForm({ ...applyForm, message: e.target.value })} />
            <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 10, flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
              <button style={{ ...s.actionBtn, ...s.secondaryBtn, flex: 1, borderRadius: 14 }} onClick={() => setApplyingJob(null)}>{t.cancel}</button>
              <button style={{ ...s.submitBtn, flex: 1, borderRadius: 14, marginTop: 0 }} onClick={submitApplication}>{t.submitApplication}</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      <div style={s.toast}>{toast}</div>
    </div>
  );
}
